elements.subject: a single gnarled plum blossom branch sweeping in from the left edge toward the right, dark ink branch with sparse muted vermilion-pink blossoms and a few small buds
a small traditional Korean paper lantern, warm muted vermilion paper body, simple dark wooden top and bottom caps, a small hanging ring at the top, a gentle inner glow suggested by a lighter wash
a single tiny falling plum blossom petal, muted vermilion-pink, seen mid-fall
a single tiny falling plum blossom petal curling slightly, muted vermilion-pink

a half-length portrait of a shabby Joseon-era gambler ghost, a middle-aged man in a worn white durumagi with a dishevelled topknot, holding a few hwatu cards close to his chest, rueful tired expression with a faint wry smile
